name: The Grand Coliseum, Akkar, and The City of Quinlor
description:
Upon completing your quest in Büora and Dütreng, you began journeying once again, until hearing about the grand coliseum Akkar, in the imperial city Quinlor. Food, drink, and the art of combat were all on display here, and there was even a large pool of Jurrs the winner of the tournament would receive. You decided to try it out, and headed towards the grand city itself.

HEYYYYY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Make sure you set your persona saying what weapon you use, what your fighting style is, and how much combat experience you have!
creator: kcp33
